conversation.text: I already know who I'm going with on valentines 🌎🔥
From now on till end of time I'm grateful it's not me 😩
I want a date with someone else sorry
If you want a date I can be your calendar
I actually have a friend for you👀
I don't pick fruits I didn't harvest
Do you do this to everyone or am I having a bad day😭
Calling me a bad day is preposterous
It was nice talking to you I have to work now😂🙌
